scope/summary: Temporarily widen payout review limits for one supervised gateway while a banking provider completes manual KYC backlog processing.
reason/summary: A bounded exception prevents payout starvation for already settled creators while preserving audit checkpoints and rollback conditions.

approvals.notes: Custodian acknowledged the bounded organizational exception.

rollback/conditions: manual review queue returns below baseline
notes: Organization-scoped exception for a supervised payout backlog.
